columns.name: AadTenantId
columns.description: The Azure AD tenant ID.

columns.name: ApiVersion
columns.description: The API version of the event.

columns.name: AppId
columns.description: The identifier for the application.

columns.name: ATContent
columns.description: Reserved for future use.

columns.name: ATContentH
columns.description: Reserved for future use.

columns.name: ATContentP
columns.description: Reserved for future use.

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: ClientAuthMethod
columns.description: Indicates how the client was authenticated. For a public client, the value is 0. If client ID and client secret are used, the value is 1. If a client certificate was used for authentication, the value is 2.

columns.name: ClientRequestId
columns.description: Optional. The client request identifier when sent. If no client request identifier is sent, the value will be equal to the operation identifier.

columns.name: DeviceId
columns.description: The identifier of the device from which the authentication request originated.

columns.name: DurationMs
columns.description: The duration of the request in milliseconds.

columns.name: IdentityProvider
columns.description: The identity provider that authenticated the subject of the token.

columns.name: IPAddress
columns.description: The IP address of the client from where the request occurred.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable is false ingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: Location
columns.description: The name of the region that served the request.

columns.name: OperationId
columns.description: The identifier for the batch. For non-batched requests, this will be unique per request. For batched requests, this will be the same for all requests in the batch.

columns.name: RequestId
columns.description: The identifier representing the request.

columns.name: RequestMethod
columns.description: The HTTP method of the event.

columns.name: RequestUri
columns.description: The URI of the request.

columns.name: ResponseSizeBytes
columns.description: The size of the response in Bytes.

columns.name: ResponseStatusCode
columns.description: The HTTP response status code for the event.

columns.name: Roles
columns.description: The roles in token claims.

columns.name: Scopes
columns.description: The scopes in token claims.

columns.name: ServicePrincipalId
columns.description: The identifier of the servicePrincipal making the request.

columns.name: SessionId
columns.description: The unique identifier for the authentication session.

columns.name: SignInActivityId
columns.description: The identifier representing the sign-in activitys.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example, OpsManager for Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager, Linux for all Linux agents, or Azure for Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The date and time the request was received.

columns.name: TokenIssuedAt
columns.description: The timestamp the token was issued at.

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table

columns.name: UniqueTokenId
columns.description: The unique token identifier of the API call used to make the audited change.

columns.name: UserAgent
columns.description: The user agent information related to request.

columns.name: UserId
columns.description: The identifier of the user making the request.

columns.name: Wids
columns.description: Denotes the tenant-wide roles assigned to this user.
